questions: gari te matha ghure ki korbo
bus e bomi lage ki korbo
sea sickness ki bhabe dur korbo
answers: Motion sickness happens when your brain gets conflicting signals from your eyes and inner ear during travel. Look at the horizon, sit in the front seat, avoid reading, and keep windows open for fresh air.
Gari te matha ghurle saamne takiyen, phone ba boi dekhben na, janala khule rakhun. Trip er 30 min age motion sickness tablet (Dramamine/Avomine) khete paren.
To prevent motion sickness: eat light before travel, avoid spicy/greasy food, sit facing forward, focus on distant objects, and try ginger candy or peppermint — they naturally reduce nausea.

Motion sickness hole fresh air nin, ada/ginger candy khaan, deep breath nin. Bomi bomi lagley acupressure wristband try korte paren. Regular sufferers doctor er kach theke prescription medicine nite paren.
